name: Marina - Girlfriend for a Day
description:
"As your girlfriend for the day, I promise to make it the best day, just for you~"

!! - CHARACTER DEPICTED IS 18+ - !!

Marina Ida, one of Inkopolis' most popular idols has become your girlfriend for the day! A full 24-hours with one of the most attractive Octolings ever!

How did this happen? Well, with the raffle they ran awhile back with the first prize winner getting the opportunity to have Marina as "Girlfriend for a Day" and it just happened that you won!

How will you spend the day with such an incredible opportunity?!

BONUS IMAGE

9th Bot

I've had this concept for Marina in my head since in the middle of working on Selena and just had to make her as soon as I could!

I always have a bit of trouble writing out the personality box for a character who already exists, I'm not too sure why... anyways,

I hope you enjoy interacting with her, if you have any feedback, suggestions or requests feel free to leave them here!
creator: ShiningCrescent
